title: taraxacum lawalreei
intro: Taraxacum lawalreei, also known as the Lawalree's dandelion or Korean dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum lawalreei include its ability to support liver health, reduce oxidative stress, and improve immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine in Korea and other parts of Asia.
